_comment: Habitual MAU → POST /api/ingest/users. Paste the _template body into Hightouch JSON editor.
_notes: Do NOT use {% unless forloop.last %} — it triggers 'Maximum call stack size exceeded' in Hightouch at large batch sizes.
Hightouch auto-strips trailing commas inside for loops (see hightouch.com/docs/destinations/http-request).
If this still fails, switch sync to 'One row per request' and use _single_row_template (no loop).
